explanations.5: This maps port 80 inside the container to port 8000 on your computer, so you can visit localhost:8000 to reach the app.
explanations.7: This syncs your local main.py file into the container so changes you make appear immediately without rebuilding.
explanations.13: The :ro at the end means 'read-only'—the container can read these files but can't modify them.
explanations.14: This creates a named volume that persists Maven's downloaded dependencies between container runs, so it doesn't re-download everything each time.
explanations.16: The > character lets you break a long command across multiple lines for readability.
